## Quick assessment

", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and drafted a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg at 9.1 kg → 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, clearance 2.8 mL/min

Clinical notes:
- CU-001: Stable; 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: Newly enrolled; first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK stability:
- Based on the latest saved config, everything looks populated and internally consistent.
- I don’t see any obvious red flags in the stored dosing parameters.
- That said, this only confirms the latest saved settings — it does not by itself verify current PK model performance or a fresh toxicity validation run.

If you want, I can also format this into an email once you give me Dr. Martinez’s address.
